## New Issue: README for OctoAcme Project Management Docs - Summary and Links

### Which process document do you want to update?
<new document>

### Summary of New Content

Create a comprehensive README for the OctoAcme Project Management Docs directory that serves as the central hub for all project management documentation. The README should:

- Provide a brief overview of OctoAcme's project management philosophy and approach
- Include organized links to all process documents in the docs/ folder
- Offer guidance on when and how to use each document
- Create a clear navigation structure for team members

This will serve as the entry point for understanding the complete OctoAcme project management framework and make it easy for new team members to find relevant processes.

### Why is this update needed?

- **Gap Identified**: Process documents currently exist but lack a central entry point and navigation guide
- **Improved Onboarding**: New team members need a quick overview and index to understand the complete project management framework
- **Discoverability**: A README acts as a single source of truth and improves document discoverability
- **User Experience**: Team members need to quickly understand the structure and find relevant guidance without searching through multiple files

### Suggested Content

The README should include:

1. **Brief Overview**: Summary of OctoAcme's project management approach (customer-first, iterative delivery, clear ownership, data-informed decisions, psychological safety)

2. **Document Index with Links**:
   - [OctoAcme Project Management Overview](./octoacme-project-management-overview.md) - Introduction to roles, principles, and lifecycle
   - [Project Initiation Guide](./octoacme-project-initiation.md) - Steps to validate and authorize work
   - [Project Planning](./octoacme-project-planning.md) - Turn initiatives into actionable plans
   - [Execution & Tracking](./octoacme-execution-and-tracking.md) - Day-to-day execution and progress management
   - [Risk Management & Communication](./octoacme-risks-and-communication.md) - Risk identification and stakeholder communication
   - [Release & Deployment Guide](./octoacme-release-and-deployment.md) - Standardized release processes
   - [Retrospective & Continuous Improvement](./octoacme-retrospective-and-continuous-improvement.md) - Capture learnings and improvements
   - [Roles & Personas](./octoacme-roles-and-personas.md) - Role definitions and responsibilities

3. **Quick Reference**: Simplified lifecycle overview pointing to relevant docs
4. **How to Use These Docs**: Guidance on maintaining and updating documentation

### Acceptance Criteria

- [x] Content aligns with existing process docs
- [x] Update improves clarity or closes a documented gap
- [x] Proposed content has been reviewed with stakeholders (if needed)
